reason: Backend guideline index for replay quality checks.
Verify stale baseline, pre-pull, and invalid operation failure semantics.
Verify schemas, snapshots, tests, and forbidden patterns.
Verify write-mode replay logs summaries and dry-run writes no logs.
Verify filesystem persistence and dry-run no-write behavior.
Verify durable replay contract is documented consistently.
Verify existing helpers were reused instead of duplicated.
Verify replay scope matches Phase 1 roadmap.
Verify hardening loop evidence and boundaries.
